allow: Bash(curl -s -i -X OPTIONS http://localhost:4000/api/chat/session -H "Origin: http://localhost:5173" -H "Access-Control-Request-Method: POST" -H "Access-Control-Request-Headers: content-type")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "killed PID $\($_.OwningProcess\)" })
